message:
fix: update useGlobalFilters tests to match __none__ sentinel preservation (#9821)

The reconciliation effect now skips clusters with the __none__ sentinel,
meaning deselectAllClusters correctly preserves "nothing selected" state.
Update 4 test expectations that incorrectly assumed __none__ would be
reconciled away to all-selected mode.

Fixes #9813

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
